rows.label: qev095301_MSG0001
rows.name: Oh! Perfect timing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0002
rows.name:
I was just about to drop
by the Home to see you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0003
rows.name:
I have a top-secret mission
straight from the director general.
Veeery hush-hush and all that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0004
rows.name:
So can you spare a moment?
Great! Here goes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0005
rows.name:
We received a report from a Collepedian
surveying Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0006
rows.name:
It seems that some Growth troops are
gathering at the mouth of Dead Man's Gulch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0007
rows.name:
They're a survey team, judging
from their equipment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Which means there may be something
important there besides the big
Doll you recovered before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0009
rows.name:
That's Director General
Chausson's theory, anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0010
rows.name:
He wants you to go there and figure
out what exactly they're after.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_JNK0010
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev095301_SEL0011
rows.name: Promise to get the job done.

rows.label: qev095301_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev095301_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that you're not going
back to that awful place.

rows.label: qev095301_JNK0030
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev095301_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Stella how much the job pays.

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0011
rows.name: That's great![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0012
rows.name:
I can see why the director
general would come to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0013
rows.name: Here's the detailed brief.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0014
rows.name:
You're a Blue Blood, remember? The
indigens there only respond to organic
life. Nothing to worry about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0015
rows.name:
Besides, the director general seems
set on you handling this one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0016
rows.name:
He had some real high praise for
your track record. Said you were
the only one for the job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0017
rows.name: Are you sure you want to turn him down?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0018
rows.name: Heh. Spoken like a true professional.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0019
rows.name:
So you'll do anything, so
long as the pay is worth it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0020
rows.name:
Well then, how does...THIS
amount strike you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0021
rows.name: No dice, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0022
rows.name:
Well, I can tell you that Director General
Chausson won't budge on the reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0023
rows.name:
So, um, just tell me if you
change your mind, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0024
rows.name:
He seemed dead set on you being
the one who handled the job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0025
rows.name:
You're familiar with the territory
so I doubt you'll get lost—but be
careful out there regardless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0026
rows.name:
We'll be waiting for your
report. Make it good news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0027
rows.name: Back empty-handed, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0028
rows.name:
Director General Chausson cares about
results, and that's pretty much it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0029
rows.name:
And right now he wants to know what
the Growth are after in that canyon,
so I suggest you go find out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0030
rows.name: I look forward to your report.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0031
rows.name:
Welcome back. Looks like you
brought back even more than the
director general had hoped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0032
rows.name:
He was practically beaming. Said that your
freeing the Zaruboggan from the bonds of
Growth servitude was deserving of high praise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0033
rows.name:
...Oh, and here's your
pay. Can't forget that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0034
rows.name:
The Zaruboggan are in quarantine
now. If the tests come back clean,
they'll be living in NLA with us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095301_MSG0035
rows.name:
They seemed really grateful to
you, so you might want to speak
to them once they're cleared.[ST:wait ]
